content.text:
Type check passes. Both verification commands succeed.

Created `src/components/landing/ProjectTeasers.tsx` per spec:
- Reads from `@/content/projects/index` (B1)
- Container size="wide", h2.t-h2 "Projects", Cluster gap={4} align="stretch", three Cards mapping `code · status` as meta, "See all projects ↗" subtle Link (B2)
- Responsive grid: 100% mobile, 50% at ≥768px, 33% at ≥900px via inlined media queries on grid children (B3)
- Vertical padding `var(--s-7)` top and bottom on `.project-teasers` (B4)
- Card hover border transition already provided by `.p-card` styles in `primitives.css` (transitions border-color to `--line-strong` over `--d-fast`) (B5)
- No thumbnails, no controls (non-goals respected)

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

- Reads from `@/content/projects/index` (B1)
- Container size="wide", h2.t-h2 "Projects", Cluster gap={4} align="stretch", three Cards mapping `code · status` as meta, "See all projects ↗" subtle Link (B2)
